description: A 23-year-old MBBS graduate in Hyderabad died by suicide after a dispute with her family over keeping a pet cat. The family reportedly opposed the cat due to allergy concerns. Upset by the disagreement, she took her own life while her family was out.

title: 'God will punish him': Karnataka social welfare department official dies by suicide, blames senior
description: A 60-year-old assistant director, set to retire soon, was found dead in his office in Pavagada. Police have registered an abetment case against the joint director based on a complaint by the deceased's wife.

description: Six people, including two women, died in separate rain, storm, and lightning incidents across Bihar in the past 24 hours. A Rajya Sabha rummy: How BJP manages ‘floating majority’ with bellwether backings
description: ​When the BJP swept to power in 2014 with a decisive majority in the Lok Sabha, it did not carry that dominance into the Rajya Sabha. The Upper House, by design, is insulated from electoral waves. Its members are elected by state assemblies, and their terms are staggered, ensuring continuity and preventing sudden shifts. This meant that even as the BJP commanded brute strength in the Lower House, it remained a minority in the Upper House for years. That imbalance mattered!
